item.arthropocolypse.field_cricket_egg.d: The eggs laid by Field Crickets when two are bred. Can be thrown to bring new baby Field Crickets to life.
item.arthropocolypse.beetle_fragment.des: An item that can be used to craft a set of armor, a variety of building blocks or a highly nutritious snack bar.
item.arthropocolypse.beetle_helmet.descr: A chitin-contoured piece of armor that grants the wearer the abilities of nature's robust leapers.
item.arthropocolypse.beetle_chestplate.d: A chitin-contoured piece of armor that grants the wearer the abilities of nature's robust leapers.
item.arthropocolypse.beetle_leggings.des: A chitin-contoured piece of armor that grants the wearer the abilities of nature's robust leapers.
item.arthropocolypse.beetle_boots.descri: A chitin-contoured piece of armor that grants the wearer the abilities of nature's robust leapers.
item.arthropocolypse.stag_beetle_egg.des: The eggs laid by Stag Beetles when two are bred. Can be thrown to bring new Stag Beetle Larvae to life.
item.arthropocolypse.stag_beetle_larva.d: A grub that can be consumed to recover a middling amount of saturation.
item.arthropocolypse.mealworm_egg.descri: The eggs laid by Mealworm Beetles when two are bred. Can be thrown to bring new Mealworms to life.
item.arthropocolypse.mealworm.descriptio: A grub that can be consumed to recover a middling amount of saturation.
item.arthropocolypse.gilded_scale.descri: An item that can be used to craft ornate gear or a highly nutritious snack bar.
item.arthropocolypse.scarab.description: An edible bug that when consumed, inflicts blindness for three seconds on the consumer.
item.arthropocolypse.gilded_organ.descri: The glamorous innards of the fearsome Desert Behemoth Spider. Used in crafting an ornate weapon.
item.arthropocolypse.gilded_scale_elytra: An upgraded elytra given defensive properties.
item.arthropocolypse.gilded_double_head_: A melee weapon that dishes out incredible damage at moderate speeds.
item.arthropocolypse.mandible_part.descr: An item that can be used to craft gear, utilities or a highly nutritious snack bar.
item.arthropocolypse.mandible_shear.desc: A vastly more durable pair of shears made from Stag Beetle chitin.
item.arthropocolypse.mandible_dagger.des: A weapon that can be thrown at distant enemies or used up close in melee.
item.arthropocolypse.ice_crawler_meat.de: A meat that can be eaten raw or cooked that's also an ingredient for a highly nutritious snack bar. Dropped by Ice Crawlers.
item.arthropocolypse.cooked_ice_crawler_: A cooked meat that restores absurdly more saturation than raw Ice Crawler Meat.
item.arthropocolypse.energy_bar.descript: A highly nutritious snack bar that can be consumed to grant much extra health and some damage resistance.
item.arthropocolypse.carrot_piece.descri: A bite-sized carrot chunk that can be used to breed Field Crickets and Mealworm Beetles or eaten quickly.
block.arthropocolypse.beetle_fragment_bl: A solid block of Beetle Fragments that can be used as building material.
A block of Beetle Fragments that has been carved into bricks.
block.arthropocolypse.chiseled_beetle_fr: A block of Beetle Fragments with a chiseled pattern.
block.arthropocolypse.polished_beetle_fr: A block of Beetle Fragments that has been polished.
block.arthropocolypse.tiled_beetle_fragm: A block of Beetle Fragments that has been carved into tiles.
block.arthropocolypse.gilded_scale_block: A solid block of Gilded Scales.
entity.arthropocolypse.field_cricket.des: A passive mob found in Plains biomes that regularly leaps high up into the air and can be bred with Carrots or Carrot Pieces. Drops Beetle Fragments when slain.
entity.arthropocolypse.behemoth_desert_s: A hostile mob found in Desert Nests that attacks by stinging its target, inflicting poison.
entity.arthropocolypse.prairie_grasshopp: A passive mob found in Plains biomes that drops Beetle Fragments when slain.
entity.arthropocolypse.ice_crawler.descr: A neutral mob found in Taiga biomes that drops its precious meat when slain.
entity.arthropocolypse.behemoth_desert_s: A hostile mob that attacks with poison and spews Scarabs on death. The boss of Desert Nests.
entity.arthropocolypse.scarab.descriptio: A hostile mob that is spawned from a dying Behemoth Desert Spider that drops itself as a low-value food item.
entity.arthropocolypse.worker_ant.descri: A neutral mob found on hills that calls for reinforcements when provoked. Boasts lower stats than their soldier counterparts.
entity.arthropocolypse.soldier_ant.descr: A neutral mob found on hills that calls for reinforcements when provoked. Boasts higher stats than their worker counterparts.
entity.arthropocolypse.stag_beetle.descr: A neutral mob found in Forests that can be bred with Apples or Melon Slices. Drops its Mandible Parts on death.
entity.arthropocolypse.wharf_roach.descr: A passive mob that scuttles at great speeds across Beaches and Stony Shores.
entity.arthropocolypse.platerodrilus.des: A passive mob found in Forests that can be tamed with logs and saddled up for transportation.
entity.arthropocolypse.mealworm_beetle.d: A neutral mob found in Forests that can be bred with Melon Slices, Apples, Carrots or Carrot Pieces.
entity.arthropocolypse.millipede_head.de: A multi-segmented neutral mob found in Lush Caves and Mineshafts that attacks with poison.
entity.arthropocolypse.mealworm.descript: A passive mob that is the juvenile form of a Mealworm Beetle. Growth into one can be sped up by being fed Melon Slices, Apples, Carrots or Carrot Pieces.
entity.arthropocolypse.angel_item.stag_b: A passive mob that is the juvenile form of a Stag Beetle. Growth into one can be sped up by being fed Melon Slices or Apples.
